channel.title: TIBCO Software Inc. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by TIBCO Software Inc. (tibco).

item.title: CVE-2026-3912 · 8.7 HIGH — TIBCO ActiveMatrix BusinessWorks Injection Vulnerability
item.description: Injection vulnerabilities due to validation/sanitisation of user-supplied input in ActiveMatrix BusinessWorks and Enterprise Administrator allows information disclosure, including exposure of accessible local files and host system details, and may al…

item.title: CVE-2026-3207 · 8.7 HIGH — TIBCO BPM Enterprise Remote Code Execution (RCE) Vulnerability
item.description: Configuration issue in Java Management Extensions (JMX) in TIBCO BPM Enterprise version 4.x allows unauthorised access.

item.title: CVE-2025-11548 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — ibi WebFOCUS - Unauthenticated RCE Vulnerability
item.description: A remote, unauthenticated privilege escalation in ibi WebFOCUS allows an attacker to gain administrative access to the application which may lead to unauthenticated Remote Code Execution

item.title: CVE-2025-2261 · 7 HIGH — TIBCO BPM Enterprise XSS Vulnerability
item.description: Stored XSS in TIBCO ActiveMatrix Administrator allows malicious data to appear to be part of the website and run within user's browser under the privileges of the web application.

item.title: CVE-2025-3751 · 7 HIGH — TIBCO ActiveMatrix BusinessWorks SQL Injection Vulnerability
item.description: The component listed above contains a vulnerability that can be exploited by an attacker to perform a SQL Injection attack. This could lead to unauthorised access to the database and exposure of sensitive information

item.title: CVE-2025-3115 · 9.4 CRITICAL — Spotfire Data Function Vulnerability
item.description: Injection Vulnerabilities: Attackers can inject malicious code, potentially gaining control over the system executing these functions. Additionally, insufficient validation of filenames during file uploads can enable attackers to upload and execute m…

item.title: CVE-2025-3114 · 9.4 CRITICAL — Spotfire Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Code Execution via Malicious Files: Attackers can create specially crafted files with embedded code that may execute without adequate security validation, potentially leading to system compromise. Sandbox Bypass Vulnerability: A flaw in the TERR secu…

item.title: CVE-2024-10218 · 9.2 CRITICAL — TIBCO Hawk Stored-XEE Vulnerability
item.description: XSS Attack in mar.jar, Monitoring Archive Utility (MAR Utility), monitoringconsolecommon.jar in TIBCO Software Inc TIBCO Hawk and TIBCO Operational Intelligence

item.title: CVE-2024-10217 · 9.2 CRITICAL — TIBCO Hawk Stored-XSS Vulnerability
item.description: XSS Attack in mar.jar, Monitoring Archive Utility (MAR Utility), monitoringconsolecommon.jar in TIBCO Software Inc TIBCO Hawk and TIBCO Operational Intelligence

item.title: CVE-2024-3325 · 8.6 HIGH — JasperReports Server Driver upload vulnerability
item.description: Vulnerability in Jaspersoft JasperReport Servers.This issue affects JasperReport Servers: from 8.0.4 through 9.0.0.

item.title: CVE-2024-3331 · 6.8 MEDIUM — Spotfire: NTLM token leakage
item.description: Vulnerability in Spotfire Spotfire Enterprise Runtime for R - Server Edition, Spotfire Spotfire Statistics Services, Spotfire Spotfire Analyst, Spotfire Spotfire Desktop, Spotfire Spotfire Server allows The impact of this vulnerability depends on the…

item.title: CVE-2024-3330 · 9.9 CRITICAL — Spotfire Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
item.description: Vulnerability in Spotfire Spotfire Analyst, Spotfire Spotfire Server, Spotfire Spotfire for AWS Marketplace allows In the case of the installed Windows client: Successful execution of this vulnerability will result in an attacker being able to run ar…

item.title: CVE-2024-4576 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — TIBCO EBX File Inclusion Vulnerability
item.description: The component listed above contains a vulnerability that allows an attacker to traverse directories and access sensitive files, leading to unauthorized disclosure of system configuration and potentially sensitive information.

item.title: CVE-2024-3182 · 6.5 MEDIUM
item.description: Install-type password disclosure vulnerability in Universal Installer including the Silent Installer in TIBCO Hawk versions 6.2.0, 6.2.1, 6.2.2 and 6.2.3 allows user's Enterprise Message Service (EMS) password to be exposed outside of the hawkagent.c…

item.title: CVE-2024-3323 · 8.3 HIGH — Reflected Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability
item.description: Cross Site Scripting in UI Request/Response Validation in TIBCO JasperReports Server 8.0.4 and 8.2.0 allows allows for the injection of malicious executable scripts into the code of a trusted application that may lead to stealing the user's active se…

item.title: CVE-2024-1137 · 4.3 MEDIUM — TIBCO ActiveSpaces Information Leak Vulnerability
item.description: The Proxy and Client components of TIBCO Software Inc.'s TIBCO ActiveSpaces - Enterprise Edition contain a vulnerability that theoretically allows an Active Spaces client to passively observe data traffic to other clients. Affected releases are TIBCO…

item.title: CVE-2024-1138 · 8.8 HIGH — TIBCO FTL Privilege Escalation
item.description: The FTL Server component of TIBCO Software Inc.'s TIBCO FTL - Enterprise Edition contains a vulnerability that allows a low privileged attacker with network access to execute a privilege escalation on the affected ftlserver. Affected releases are TIB…

item.title: CVE-2023-26222 · 8.7 HIGH — TIBCO EBX Cross-site Scripting (XXS) Vulnerability
item.description: The Web Application component of TIBCO Software Inc.'s TIBCO EBX and TIBCO Product and Service Catalog powered by TIBCO EBX contains an easily exploitable vulnerability that allows a low privileged attacker with network access to execute a stored XSS…

item.title: CVE-2023-26221 · 5 MEDIUM — TIBCO Spotfire Insufficiently Protected Credential vulnerability
item.description: The Spotfire Connectors component of TIBCO Software Inc.'s Spotfire Analyst, Spotfire Server, and Spotfire for AWS Marketplace contains an easily exploitable vulnerability that allows a low privileged attacker with read/write access to craft maliciou…

item.title: CVE-2023-26219 · 7.4 HIGH — TIBCO Operational Intelligence Hawk RedTail Credential Exposure Vulnerability
item.description: The Hawk Console and Hawk Agent components of TIBCO Software Inc.'s TIBCO Hawk, TIBCO Hawk Distribution for TIBCO Silver Fabric, TIBCO Operational Intelligence Hawk RedTail, and TIBCO Runtime Agent contain a vulnerability that theoretically allows an…

item.title: CVE-2023-26220 · 5.4 MEDIUM — TIBCO Spotfire Stored Cross-site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability
item.description: The Spotfire Library component of TIBCO Software Inc.'s Spotfire Analyst and Spotfire Server contains an easily exploitable vulnerability that allows a low privileged attacker with network access to execute a Stored Cross Site Scripting (XSS) on the…

item.title: CVE-2023-26218 · 8 HIGH — TIBCO Nimbus Reflected Cross-site Scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities
item.description: The Web Client component of TIBCO Software Inc.'s TIBCO Nimbus contains easily exploitable Reflected Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities that allow a low privileged attacker to social engineer a legitimate user with network access to execute s…

item.title: CVE-2023-26217 · 8.8 HIGH — TIBCO EBX Add-ons SQL Injection Vulnerability
item.description: The Data Exchange Add-on component of TIBCO Software Inc.'s TIBCO EBX Add-ons contains an easily exploitable vulnerability that allows a low privileged user with import permissions and network access to the EBX server to execute arbitrary SQL stateme…

item.title: CVE-2023-26215 · 7.7 HIGH — TIBCO EBX® Add-ons Path Traversal
item.description: The server component of TIBCO Software Inc.'s TIBCO EBX Add-ons contains a vulnerability that allows an attacker with low-privileged application access to read system files that are accessible to the web server. Affected releases are TIBCO Software I…

item.title: CVE-2023-26216 · 9.1 CRITICAL — TIBCO EBX Add-ons Arbitrary File Write
item.description: The server component of TIBCO Software Inc.'s TIBCO EBX Add-ons contains an exploitable vulnerability that allows an attacker to upload files to a directory accessible by the web server. Affected releases are TIBCO Software Inc.'s TIBCO EBX Add-ons:…

item.title: CVE-2023-29268 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — TIBCO Spotfire Statistics Services Unrestricted File Upload Vulnerability
item.description: The Splus Server component of TIBCO Software Inc.'s TIBCO Spotfire Statistics Services contains a vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated remote attacker to upload or modify arbitrary files within the web server directory on the affected system.…

item.title: CVE-2023-26214 · 7.3 HIGH — TIBCO BusinessConnect Reflected XSS Vulnerability
item.description: The BusinessConnect UI component of TIBCO Software Inc.'s TIBCO BusinessConnect contains easily exploitable Reflected Cross Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities that allow a low privileged attacker with network access to execute scripts targeting the…

item.title: CVE-2022-41567 · 7.3 HIGH — TIBCO BusinessConnect Stored XSS Vulnerability
item.description: The BusinessConnect UI component of TIBCO Software Inc.'s TIBCO BusinessConnect contains an easily exploitable vulnerability that allows a low privileged attacker with network access to execute a cross-site scripting (XSS) attack on the affected syst…

item.title: CVE-2022-41566 · 8.7 HIGH — TIBCO EBX Add-ons Cross Site Scripting (XSS) Vulnerability
item.description: The server component of TIBCO Software Inc.'s TIBCO EBX Add-ons contains an easily exploitable vulnerability that allows a low privileged attacker with network access to execute stored XSS on the affected system. Affected releases are TIBCO Software…

item.description: The Web Application component of TIBCO Software Inc.'s TIBCO EBX and TIBCO Product and Service Catalog powered by TIBCO EBX contains an easily exploitable vulnerability that allows a low privileged attacker with network access to execute a stored XSS…

item.title: CVE-2022-41564 · 6.8 MEDIUM — TIBCO Operational Intelligence Hawk Redtail Credential Exposure Vulnerability
item.description: The Hawk Console component of TIBCO Software Inc.'s TIBCO Hawk and TIBCO Operational Intelligence Hawk RedTail contains a vulnerability that will return the EMS transport password and EMS SSL password to a privileged user. Affected releases are TIBCO…

item.description: The Statement Set Upload via the Web Client component of TIBCO Software Inc.'s TIBCO Nimbus contains an easily exploitable vulnerability that allows a low privileged attacker with network access to execute a Denial of Service Attack on the affected s…

item.title: CVE-2022-41559 · 9.3 CRITICAL 🌩️ — TIBCO Nimbus Open Redirect Vulnerability
item.description: The Web Client component of TIBCO Software Inc.'s TIBCO Nimbus contains an easily exploitable vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated attacker with network access to exploit an open redirect on the affected system. A successful attack using this…
